questions.question_text: What is the primary requirement for a valid offer in contract law?
options: It must be communicated to the offeree.
It must be written and signed.

questions.question_text: Which of the following is NOT a valid way to accept an offer?
What is the effect of a counteroffer on the original offer?
options: It has no effect on the original offer.

questions.question_text: In which of the following scenarios is an offer considered revoked?
options: The offeror changes their mind but does not inform the offeree.
The offeror communicates withdrawal before acceptance.

questions.question_text: When does acceptance of an offer become effective in a bilateral contract?
options: When the offeree sends the acceptance.
When the offeror receives the acceptance.
